title: ayenia spinosa
intro: Ayenia spinosa, also known as the "thorny ayenia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ayenia spinosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Ayenia spinosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
